mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY reg_date DESC) `row_number` , id, title, start_date, end_date, reg_date, mod_date, is_published FROM project WHERE admin_id = 1 AND is_deleted = #{isDeleted}

SELECT p.*, s.*, i.*, pn.* ,p.id AS p_id ,s.id AS s_id ,i.id AS i_id ,pn.id AS pn_id ,p.title AS p_title ,s.title AS s_title ,pn.title AS pn_title FROM (SELECT * FROM project WHERE admin_id = 1 AND id = #{id}) p LEFT JOIN section s ON (p.id = s.project_id) LEFT JOIN image i ON (p.id = i.project_id) LEFT JOIN project_note pn ON (p.id = pn.project_id)
mapper.insert: INSERT section (project_id, about_id, title, content) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{aboutId}, #{title}, #{content})
INSERT image (project_id, about_id, ori_name, saved_name, extension) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{aboutId}, #{oriName}, #{savedName}, #{extension})
mapper.delete: UPDATE project SET is_published = 0 ,is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND admin_id = 1;
